channel.title: Posts on petergs
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on petergs

item.title: Learning Splunk Through BOTS
item.description: On May 14th, I participated in Splunk’s BOTS CTF for the first time and it was a ton of fun! I created a team with someone I met in the BHIS Getting Started in Security Discord. Neither of us had production experience with Splunk, and we came in 56 out of 209 teams. Though I can’t write in too much detail about the challenges since this version of BOTS is still running, here are some resources I used to prepare.
